node.name: DonateWithAthena
node.description: A full-stack donation, awareness, and engagement platform built for Morgan Stanley Code To Give 2025. Empowers Shield of Athena with modern tools for donor outreach, impact storytelling, automated marketing, and community education.

node.name: plezy-tizen
node.description: Tizen fork of Plezy, a modern Plex & Jellyfin client built with Flutter

node.name: AVLTree
node.description: A generic, memory-safe implementation of an AVL self-balancing binary search tree in C++. Includes set-style operators, iterators, deep copy support, and performance-optimized operations.

node.name: Resume
node.description: Automates the generation of multilingual LaTeX CVs and cover letters using PowerShell scripts, with support for selective builds, batch compilation, and digital signature embedding.

node.description: Matériel de démonstration et ressources que j’ai créés comme auxiliaire d’enseignement à l’UQAM.

node.name: linutil
node.description: Chris Titus Tech's Linux Toolbox - Linutil is a distro-agnostic toolbox designed to simplify everyday Linux tasks.
